title: Limit tag creation
excerpt: Is it possible limit tag creation to admins only?

posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible limit tag creation to admins only?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there Mark!

This isn’t possible at the moment but you do have two workaround options!

  1. If you have an Enterprise account, you can use Account Permissions settings to limit what admins versus account members can do,
  2. You can use Board Permissions to limit what people can do on the board. However, you won’t be able to limit actions to just admins, only board owners.

What do you think?
